payload.answer: I’m not sure which Sam this note refers to. Can you clarify who you mean before I save it?

entity_resolution.reason: The note refers to an ambiguous entity named Sam, model confidence is low, and cloud escalation is disabled, so the system should not resolve or commit this as durable memory without user clarification.

details: User clarification is required due to low-confidence entity resolution.

repair_options: Clarify which Sam the note is about.
